Guest Reviews

What Our Guests Say

Rated 4.9 / 5 from over 240+ verified reviews. Awarded TripAdvisor Travelers' Choice — top 10% of tour operators worldwide.

★★★★★

TripAdvisor

Travelers' Choice 2022

★★★★★

Google Reviews

4.9 • 180+ reviews

★★★★★

FareHarbor

4.9 • 240+ verified bookings

Sarah M.

Denver, CO • March 2025

★★★★★

"Incredible kayak tour to the Mokulua Islands! Our guide Kai knew all the best spots for sea turtles and the views were breathtaking. The e-bike add-on was genius — we explored all of Kailua after. Can't recommend Active Oahu enough!"

Mokulua Islands Guided Kayak Tour

James & Lisa T.

Portland, OR • February 2025

★★★★★

"Best part of our Hawaii vacation! The self-guided kayak rental was super easy — they delivered everything to Kailua Beach. Saw turtles, manta rays, and had the Mokulua Islands practically to ourselves. Equipment was top-notch."

Self-Guided Kayak Rental

The Rodriguez Family

Austin, TX • January 2025

★★★★★

"Took our kids (8 and 11) on the guided Kailua Bay tour. Perfect for families — calm waters, patient guides, and the kids couldn't stop talking about the sea turtles. We'll be back next year!"

Kailua Bay Family Kayak Tour

David K.

San Francisco, CA • December 2024

★★★★★

"The Kaneohe Sandbar tour was unreal. Standing on a sandbar in the middle of the bay with the Ko'olau mountains as backdrop — pure magic. Guide was hilarious and knowledgeable. Already planning our return trip."

Kaneohe Sandbar Kayak Tour

Emma & Rachel

Chicago, IL • November 2024

★★★★★

"Girls trip highlight! The e-bike tour through Kailua and Lanikai was the perfect way to explore. Stopped at secret beaches, got amazing acai bowls, and the e-bikes made the hills a breeze. Felt like locals for a day!"

Kailua E-Bike Adventure

Mike W.

Seattle, WA • October 2024

★★★★★

"Rented kayaks for 3 days. They delivered to our Airbnb in Lanikai each morning and picked up when we were done. The gear was clean, well-maintained, and the price was fair. This is how outdoor adventures should work."

Multi-Day Kayak Rental

The Park Family

Los Angeles, CA • September 2024

★★★★★

"Chinaman's Hat kayak trip was the adventure of a lifetime. Our guide shared Hawaiian legends about the island, we hiked to the top for epic photos, and the water was crystal clear. Highlight of our 10-day Oahu trip."

Chinaman's Hat Kayak & Hike

Ashley R.

New York, NY • August 2024

★★★★★

"I was nervous about kayaking solo but the team made me feel so comfortable. Did the Kahana River tour — like paddling through Jurassic Park! Peaceful, beautiful, and the guide took amazing photos for me. Solo traveler approved!"

Kahana River Kayak Tour

Join 240+ Happy Adventurers

Experience Oahu's windward coast with the team that guests call "the highlight of our Hawaii vacation."

Book Your Adventure Now

🌊 Active Oahu Tours

Guided kayak, e-bike, and outdoor adventures on Oahu's stunning windward coast. Experience the real Hawaii with local guides who call these waters home.
